source: GRE高频词 + Word Power Made Easy体系

words.englishDef: To formally reject or renounce a belief or cause
words.example: He abjured his former political views.
words.exampleTrans: 他正式放弃了以前的政治观点。

words.englishDef: To make an unpleasant feeling less intense
words.example: He tried to assuage her grief with kind words.
words.exampleTrans: 他试图用温言来减轻她的悲痛。

words.englishDef: Cheerful and full of energy; exuberant
words.example: Her ebullient personality lit up every room.
words.exampleTrans: 她热情洋溢的个性照亮了每个房间。

words.englishDef: To leave hurriedly and secretly to escape custody
words.example: The accountant absconded with the company funds.
words.exampleTrans: 会计携公司资金潜逃了。

words.chinese: 平淡无奇的；缺乏想象力的
words.englishDef: Having the style of prose; lacking imagination; commonplace
words.example: His life was utterly prosaic and devoid of adventure.
words.exampleTrans: 他的生活极其平淡，缺乏冒险。

words.chinese: 刺耳的噪音；不和谐的声音
words.englishDef: A harsh discordant mixture of sounds
words.example: The cacophony of horns filled the streets.
words.exampleTrans: 喇叭声的嘈杂充斥着街道。

words.englishDef: Bitterness or ill feeling, especially in speech
words.example: The divorce was settled with much acrimony.
words.exampleTrans: 离婚在激烈的争吵中解决了。

words.englishDef: Giving or indicating a good chance of success; favorable
words.example: The timing was propitious for launching the product.
words.exampleTrans: 这个时机对产品发布非常有利。

words.englishDef: Serving as a desirable model; representing the best
words.example: Her exemplary work ethic inspired the whole team.
words.exampleTrans: 她典范的工作态度激励了整个团队。

words.englishDef: Modest or shy due to a lack of self-confidence
words.example: She was diffident about sharing her opinion.
words.exampleTrans: 她对于分享自己的意见感到羞怯。
